## Checklist

- [ ] Beginner/basic workflow remains simple
- [ ] Advanced material is placed outside the Basic Workflow
- [ ] Steps are practical and direct
- [ ] External software is optional, not required
- [ ] Screenshots/assets are credited or original
- [ ] Local links were checked
